description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named F´ Project Builder that builds an external F´ project using the current F´ version. The workflow takes several inputs, including the path to the module to build, the target repository, and the platform to run on. It checks out the target repository, overlays the current F´ revision, installs requirements, generates a build cache, and builds the project. Optionally, it can also run unit tests in parallel.
